title: AutoTotem
description: A lightweight mod that auto-equips a Totem of Undying with delay, offhand modes, and HP threshold settings.
body:
AutoTotem is a lightweight client-side mod that automatically equips the Totem of Immortality to your left hand when needed.

The mod allows for flexible configuration of the auto-swapping behavior:

Adjustable delay (0-2 seconds)

Select left-hand mode (swap or leave the item unequipped)

Health threshold for auto-equipment

Hotkeys (on/off, forced equipping, opening settings)

Display of totem count in the HUD

The mod is free of unnecessary features and is focused on stable and user-friendly operation.
This mod also works locally.
